message:
fix(supply_chain): add serde backward-compatibility for CertificationResult new fields (bd-1wpq)

New `manually_adjusted` and `evidence_derived_level` fields on
CertificationResult would break deserialization of existing serialized
data. Add `#[serde(default)]` to both fields and `impl Default for
CertificationLevel` (returns Uncertified — fail-closed) so old data
round-trips correctly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
